segments.text: It is said that God is love.
We have heard, many a times
and people explain in their own ways
what is Love
but to feel this Love
Is the best way of understanding it
Even if you
explain or describe
In all details
Though it's described
in all details. You cannot enjoy love without experiencing it, this experience comes to
us because God Himself has placed within of the mechanism to absorb his love and manifest
It is a very delicate mechanism within us, extremely delicate.
This mechanism in placed our heart by our ignorance so many times we spoil this
mechanism or disturb it – sometimes even completely destroy the light of love
Anything else cannot give you joy.
It's only the love that your feel in heart gives you joy, this mechanism acts since
seven layers within us . In periphery of these seven layers we have got ripples
of this joy arising, they come to the shores
off our brain and create the bubbles
or Joy. But again if
The Brain is a very rational
Rock then these bubbles
dissolve giving no effect
To rock so A loving person
Is thousand times better than a rational person
But most of the people feel this love only on the periphery
Of their outermost layer which is
The light of Muladhara.
As you know that Muladhara has got excretory effects
And how important or relieved we feel
When our excretions are all right
It's a basic thing
But that relief gives you a kind of joy and happiness, very gross, low type as they call
it.
Very important for us to get the joy but make this joy not so dominating over all
other joys or deeper sensitivity is to be innocent I know one cannot be innocent
You have to be innocent yourself, but with Sahaja Yoga you can by clearing your Muladhara.
So that's very important – our muladharas must clear and our innocence must be established
so these gross joys do not cover the entire spectrum of life
and make us slaves of these gross, joy-giving reliefs.
But to clean your Muladhara does not mean by any chance in Sahaj Yoga
get after any kind obsession or obstruction
but give a natural release like an innocent child
To these ripples, which need not go back to all the other layers of joy.
You must have seen when the ripples in an ocean touch the shores they turn back
If the shore are made up very hard rocks this turning can be very deep
If the brain is very ego-oriented, is covered with ego then these joys have a much greater
significance in life than normally it has.
Innocence – this only way one can neutralize those ripples coming back on other six
very important layers. As you go forward,
You know in the second layer is a joy of creativity
In that Joy Of Creativity when the Joy
Of Creativity comes within us
it again come back to periphery
for some people It's so important
So maddening
To create something they are mad after
and They think its something so important
to do,to create some thought ,to create some book .To create some artistic impressions
or something.
For people it's very important so they create and this creativity when hit some
rational mind gives him the same kind of a deeper reaction that a person starts thinking
that He is the greatest of all and whatever he does to rest
in world, it's alright as long
like a great creator thought or idea.
Such man can become very dogmatic dominating
And could be tyrannical because
you think what ever we do showing results
showing success according him.
He rationalizes whole thing
but when things goes back much deeper into
covers all other His chakras.
So the neutralizing of this second layer is thoughtless awareness, nirvikaar, nirvichara.
When your awareness in enlightened Samadhi and you are
nirvichara state, then whatever you create just see it in thoughtless awareness.
You really enjoy what ever is seen or what ever your created and that's how it kept
to the periphery . It should be important for it to keep coming on the brain because
The brain is the one which records it, and if a brain has such solid stuff that cannot
record or sensitive most of them are lost in giving reaction.
And all joy is finished for example you create some painting just look at without any thought
The complete joy of your heart, which you have poured onto that canvas will be filling
You completely and feel the flow or joy going down.
If creation is done in thoughtless awareness then it's most beautiful apart from
That It Is Most Beautiful ,It' s the most perfect because such a painting
Or Such an art
Or such a creation, such thought ,such book, such an idea will emit vibrations.
The coefficients to emit vibration is complete if it's done in thoughtless awareness that
why those who are realized souls when they create something or they produce
something, you find it easy to find out whether it is giving vibrations or not – very easy.
In the same way we go through third very-very important center of your Nabhi…Nabi
Or you can call it the navel chakra.
The joy of feeling that You have eaten food cannot be described, in Marathi jyotas sangla
podh varlam saheb.

talk with Him.
And when you eat the food, the joy that you get out of it also goes to periphery as usual.
If is does go a rational rock then again effect is deeper if start thinking about

all those things. And then you think
That
I'm going to have more of these
and more

My stomach
Now when

We are limited
Stomach
You can't eat
Mons of food
Some people

then when your stomach is limited you start thinking
oh my stomach has been limited
still the joy of Navi Chakra is not yet complete
let me think something else
so maybe with alcohol
because alcohol takes no space in the stomach
You think it has a different spacing in the stomach.

At this time
The movement starts towards left
Of joy

are going into a very romantic mood or some sort nonsense like this.
Then You spend all Your Time wasting Your life taking to laziness ,to inertia .You may

Man go'son wasting his time trying
To get joy out from something which
Is so dangerous for your being
Anybody who says that drinking is very bad

or I don't know, whatever it is that they brand the person.
Now how to get rid of nabi complication?
Because these joys are so temporary you will see in every case
now nabi joy also very temporary and
then do not enjoy much if could
You would go into again and again
So neutralizing point is satisfaction
You should feel satisfied.
Here we've eaten all right two morsels, you'll be much happy than like a bakkasur if
eat a mound of rice to be satisfied is the only way that can neutralize your Nabhi in
all your wants, material want. There's no end to it! You go on supplying any number
of things you'll going asking for more but you have not enjoyed anything .You have bought
one piece cloth ,you made a shirt yourself and now another because the person who is
working in office has got this kind off shirts so he will run over world to find
that shirt, but the one who is wearing this shirt he's running all over world to find
a shirt as you have made.
So these madness goes on increasing and the Nabhi chakra remains in big turmoil so
One of neutralizing points most important satisfaction of Nabi at every point
should try feel satisfied alright if I haven't got it I am satisfied
At that moment you will get the joy, I've got this thing all right and satisfied.
You'll get to enjoy it
And others would be also in happy disposition
Imagine a man who is gregarious living
In house when he just don't like such a man
It looks so odd

aapaji.

We don't have go further
This way That will just go deep

Such a person is such headache, I tell you.

Their love. Satisfaction you cannot have without realization
so before that if I say it should be satisfied just brainwashing

started

your 2 annas would have been lost

is Madhurya

little of them so they get the complete fragrance

This universality

so that to become a part-and parcel of Virat
